arts.sum: In a highly anticipated Coppa Italia quarter-final clash, AC Milan will host Roma at the iconic San Siro on Wednesday evening. arts.ttl: Joao Felix signs for AC Milan on loan from Chelsea - as he joins Kyle Walker and Co just six months after penning a SEVEN-year contract with the Blues
arts.sum: It has been an underwhelming second spell in west London for Felix, who since his £46million move in August has largely been limited to substitute appearances in the Premier League.
